handoffs.waitsFor: Current campaign hook, required on-screen message, platform intent.
handoffs.nextAction: Designer has portfolio context; build only short visual prototypes after user direction.
handoffs.userTouchpoint: Ask user to choose direction only after a small portfolio is visible.

handoffs.waitsFor: Selected creative direction and rejected-direction notes.
handoffs.nextAction: Manni prepares platform copy only for directions marked ja/candidate, not for rejected visuals.
handoffs.userTouchpoint: Notify user when a portfolio has 3+ viable options or when all options are weak.

handoffs.waitsFor: Latest audience signal, hook type priority, channel hypothesis.
handoffs.nextAction: Use audience signal to decide whether this batch optimizes completion, shares, follows, or website clicks.
handoffs.userTouchpoint: If KPI data is missing, ask user for platform screenshots or export before inventing performance claims.

handoffs.waitsFor: Fresh photos, video snippets, Daumenkino references, rejected-style feedback, or preferred visual direction.
handoffs.nextAction: When no strong source image exists, request content before rendering polished assets.
handoffs.userTouchpoint: Message user with one concrete request, not a vague creative prompt.

handoffs.waitsFor: Explicit personal OK for platform, asset, caption, timing, and landing URL.
handoffs.nextAction: Keep all social outputs as external_draft until approval is logged.
handoffs.userTouchpoint: Ask for OK only on a concrete preview package.

handoffs.waitsFor: Website/UI files changed; user-facing behavior must not rely on manual inspection only.
handoffs.nextAction: Guardian must ask Webbie for tests or add focused tests before release-ready status.
handoffs.userTouchpoint: Only ask user if expected behavior or content is ambiguous.

handoffs.waitsFor: Desktop/Flight Deck UI changed; logic tests and, for visible changes, E2E proof must follow.
handoffs.nextAction: Guardian must ask Winnie for focused Desktop tests before release-ready status.
handoffs.userTouchpoint: Only ask user if workflow intent or acceptance criteria are unclear.

handoffs.waitsFor: Scripts/server/desktop main logic changed; command validation or tests must prove behavior.
handoffs.nextAction: Guardian must run or request the narrow command that proves the changed script path.
handoffs.userTouchpoint: Only ask user for credentials or live-system approval if a validation needs external access.

handoffs.waitsFor: A menu, navigation, tab, section, button, modal, or visible feature may have changed.
handoffs.nextAction: Responsible primary agent must confirm tests exist for the new entry point and failure path.
handoffs.userTouchpoint: Ask user for acceptance only after a working preview or clear behavior summary exists.
